title: Perplexity CEO tells CNBC one metric will determine who wins the AI race
summary_full: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas said that whichever company can provide the "most taken value per watt per user" will be the AI winners in the future.
summary_public: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas said that whichever company can provide the "most taken value per watt per user" will be the AI winners in the future.
